mapper.select: SELECT t1.id , t1.title , t1.status_cd , m1.code_name AS status_name , t1.priority_cd , m2.code_name AS priority_name , t1.deadline , t1.detail , t1.update_at FROM sprout_item t1 LEFT JOIN m_code m1 ON t1.status_cd = m1.code AND m1.code_id = '01' LEFT JOIN m_code m2 ON t1.priority_cd = m2.code AND m2.code_id = '02' ORDER BY CASE t1.status_cd WHEN 2 THEN 1 WHEN 1 THEN 2 WHEN 3 THEN 3 ELSE 4 END , t1.priority_cd DESC , t1.deadline ASC , t1.update_at DESC

SELECT t1.id , t1.title , t1.status_cd , m1.code_name AS status_name , t1.priority_cd , m2.code_name AS priority_name , t1.deadline , t1.detail , t1.update_at FROM sprout_item t1 LEFT JOIN m_code m1 ON t1.status_cd = m1.code AND m1.code_id = '01' LEFT JOIN m_code m2 ON t1.priority_cd = m2.code AND m2.code_id = '02' WHERE t1.id = #{id} ORDER BY CASE t1.status_cd WHEN 2 THEN 1 WHEN 1 THEN 2 WHEN 3 THEN 3 ELSE 4 END , t1.priority_cd DESC , t1.deadline ASC , t1.update_at DESC
